auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue to your account
auth.logoutSuccessMessage: You have been logged out successfully.
auth.registerSubtitle: Register to start using the app
auth.otpHint: Enter the code sent to your phone (mock flow uses any 4+ digits).
auth.resetInstructions: Enter your email or phone and we will send reset instructions.
auth.enterEmailOrPhone: Please enter your email or phone number.
auth.resetLinkSentMessage: This is a mock flow. Continue to set a new password.
auth.resetPasswordHint: Choose a strong new password for your account.
auth.passwordsMustMatch: Passwords must match and not be empty.
auth.enterSmsCode: Enter the SMS code to complete sign-in

loginOptions.subtitle: Pick how you want to sign in and start exploring the app hub.
loginOptions.jumpHint: Already know your path? Jump straight to the classic auth screen.

camera.title: Camera
camera.hubSubtitle: Snap selfies with fun overlays, scan QR codes, or read product barcodes.
camera.barcodeSubtitle: Scan EAN, UPC, Code 128 and more
camera.permissionBody: Allow camera permission to use snap, QR, and barcode modes.
camera.noDevice: No camera device found on this phone.
camera.captureFailed: Could not capture photo. Try again.
camera.qrHint: Align the QR code inside the frame
camera.barcodeHint: Align the barcode on the red line
camera.snapDisabledMessage: This feature is temporarily turned off. Check back later from the camera hub.
camera.savePermissionFailed: Could not save to your gallery. Check photo library permission and try again.
camera.filtersPreviewOnly: Filters are preview-only and are not baked into the saved photo.
camera.permissionDenied: Camera permission was denied. Enable it in Settings to continue.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.hubSubtitle: Uber-style courier tracking with live map
delivery.orderPlacedBody: We are finding a courier for you.
delivery.invalidAddresses: Select valid pickup and drop-off addresses.
delivery.sameAddress: Pickup and drop-off must be different.
delivery.acceptJobFailed: Could not accept this delivery job. Try again.
delivery.statusUpdateFailed: Could not update delivery status. Try again.
delivery.locationBody: Allow location to show your position on the delivery map.
delivery.finishActiveJobHint: Finish your active delivery before accepting another job.
delivery.createOrderFailed: Could not place the order. Try again.
delivery.cancelOrderFailed: Could not cancel the order. Try again.
delivery.backgroundLocationBody: Allow always-on location so customers can track you while the app is in the background during an active delivery.
delivery.backgroundLocationStepFine: Step 1: allow precise location while using the app.
delivery.backgroundLocationStepBackground: Step 2: choose Allow all the time for background courier tracking.
delivery.backgroundTrackingActive: Background tracking is active for this delivery.
delivery.enableDriverHint: Enable courier mode and availability to accept jobs.
delivery.noOpenJobs: No open jobs at the moment.
delivery.jobAcceptedBody: Head to pickup and update status as you go.

marketplace.invalidListing: Fill in title, description, and a valid price.
marketplace.listingPublishedBody: Your item is now live in the marketplace.
marketplace.storeClosed: The store is closed and not accepting orders right now.

merchant.title: Merchant portal
merchant.replySentBody: Your response is visible to the customer.
merchant.noProducts: No products in your catalog yet.

merchant.acceptOrdersOn: Customers can place orders from your store.
merchant.acceptOrdersOff: New checkout orders are blocked while closed.

designSystem.hubSubtitle: Browse every component with all variants and states. Tap an item to open its showcase.

errors.sectionProblem: This section ran into a problem. You can try again without restarting the app.

maintenance.message: We're performing scheduled maintenance. Please check back shortly.

onboarding.slide1Subtitle: Your all-in-one hub for social, tasks, chat, and more.
onboarding.slide2Subtitle: Todos, focus timer, and wallet tools in one place.
onboarding.slide3Subtitle: Sign in and explore every module from the home hub.

home.title: Home
home.appModulesSubtitle: Organized like popular super-apps — social, commerce, and media
home.purpose: RNTS Template is an all-in-one React Native hub: authentication, social feed, tasks, chat, wallet, games, and media — wired with Axios, React Query, and Redux.

onboard.title: 1. Onboard & sign in
onboard.description: Complete onboarding, then sign in with email (mock API in dev) or Firebase social providers.

home.title: 2. Explore the hub
home.description: Home loads live dashboard stats from the API layer and links to every module.

social.title: 3. Social & productivity
social.description: Use Feed, Todos, and Chat — data is cached with React Query and synced to Redux where needed.

walletGame.title: 4. Wallet & game
walletGame.description: Track balance, transfers, and spin the lucky wheel for coins.

media.title: 5. Media library
media.description: Record and play audio/video, browse the gallery — uploads go through the media API client.

feed.title: Social Feed
feed.emptyMessage: Be the first to share something with the community.
feed.loadError: We couldn't load the feed right now.

posts.communitySubtitle: Share text, images, audio and video. Like, comment and save posts.
posts.pollQuestionPlaceholder: What do you want to ask?

wordPuzzle.libraryHint: Pick a book. Each land has 50 locations with mini riddles.
wordPuzzle.libraryHintApi: Books and riddles are loaded live from trusted public APIs.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load puzzles. Check your connection and try again.

wordPuzzle.separateLanguagesNote: Arabic and English puzzles never mix on the same screen.
wordPuzzle.mapHint: Complete locations in order to unlock the path.
wordPuzzle.stageSuccessBody: Great job — continue to the next match.
wordPuzzle.bookCompleteBody: You finished every location in this book.
wordPuzzle.dragHint: Drag from the first letter to the last to form the word.
wordPuzzle.dragHintShared: Swipe clues freely. Spell any remaining word on the shared board — used letters lock.

islamic.title: Islamic
islamic.hubSubtitle: Quran, adhkar, authentic hadith, and prayer times — powered by trusted public APIs.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load content. Check your connection and try again.

quran.title: Quran
quran.hubSubtitle: Ayat-style reading with tafsir, reciters, and index
quran.searchHint: Search by surah, ayah reference, or verse text.
quran.tafsirReaderHint: Tap any ayah to play from there · toggle tafsir below
quran.backgroundHint: Audio keeps playing if you leave the app (without closing it).
quran.tapAyahHint: Tap any ayah to jump the reciter there. Your place is saved automatically.

search.title: Islamic search
search.hubSubtitle: Search Quran, adhkar, and hadith in one place
search.allPlaceholder: Search any ayah, dhikr, or hadith...
search.allHint: Search Quran ayahs, adhkar text, and hadith text — or pick a scope below.
search.surahHint: Type a surah name or number.
search.textHint: Type at least 2 characters to search any ayah text.
search.adhkarHint: Type at least 2 characters to search inside any dhikr.
search.hadithHint: Type at least 2 characters to search any hadith.
search.emptyMessage: Try a surah name, ayah reference, dhikr, or hadith keyword.
search.keepTypingMessage: Enter at least 2 characters to search.
search.noResultsMessage: Try another keyword, or pick a suggestion.
search.openAyah: Open this ayah in the reader

adhkar.title: Adhkar
adhkar.hubSubtitle: Daily remembrances with beautiful voices — Al-Afasy, Abbad, Jibril & more
adhkar.readersSubtitle: Morning, evening, sleep, waking — tap and play
adhkar.browseSubtitle: Open a group card — every chapter is organized, including Other adhkar
adhkar.source: Text: Hisn al-Muslim · Voices: Hisn & Makkah Live
adhkar.continuousHint: Playing a full session track — scroll and follow along with the text.
adhkar.backgroundHint: Audio keeps playing if you leave the app (without closing it).

hadith.title: Hadith
hadith.subtitle: Browse authentic collections with scholar grades
hadith.searchHint: Type at least 2 characters to search.
hadith.filterBooksPlaceholder: Filter book list by number or name
hadith.editionsBanner: Choose a collection to begin reading
hadith.noWeakOnPage: No weak-graded hadith on this page — try Next.
hadith.emptyPage: No hadith text on this page — advancing…
hadith.rateLimited: Hadith server is busy (rate limit). Please wait a moment.
hadith.rateLimitedHint: The API allows a few pages per minute. Cached pages stay available — wait and tap Try again or Next.

prayer.title: Prayer times
prayer.reminderBody: It is time for {{prayer}} ({{time}}). The Adhan is playing.
prayer.qiblaHint: Hold your phone flat and turn until the needle points to the Kaaba.
prayer.qiblaNeedLocation: Set a GPS or timezone location with coordinates to use the Qibla compass.
prayer.chooseLocationSubtitle: Prayer times follow your place. Use GPS or search any city with Google Places — timezone is detected automatically.
prayer.needLocationBody: Use GPS or search a city so we can show accurate prayer times for where you are.
prayer.useGpsBody: We’ll request location permission, reverse-geocode your place, and resolve your timezone with Google.
prayer.locationDenied: Location permission denied. Please search for a city.
prayer.locationFailed: Could not get your location. Please search for a city.
prayer.pickCityBody: Type a city name. We resolve coordinates and timezone from Google Maps — no static city lists.
prayer.mapsKeyRequired: Google Maps API key is required for city search. Add GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY with Places, Geocoding, and Time Zone APIs enabled.
prayer.noCityResults: No cities found. Try another spelling.
prayer.adhanSoundBody: Choose which Adhan plays when a prayer reminder fires. Tap play to preview.

settings.title: Islamic reminders
settings.notificationsDescription: Receive random-time adhkar reminders on this device.
settings.hourlyDescription: Several random times each day with a random dhikr (and optional Quran/hadith).
settings.includeAdhkarDescription: Morning/evening and random dhikr from Hisn al-Muslim.
settings.fcmDescription: Copy this device token into Firebase Console → Cloud Messaging to send test pushes after you add google-services.json / GoogleService-Info.plist.
settings.fcmUnavailable: Enable reminders and grant notification permission to generate a token.
